name: FAA Part 107 Remote Pilot Certificate (sUAS)
cross_cutting_tags: Agriculture → Ag Tech & Automation; Arts Entertainment & Design → Media Production & Broadcasting; Construction → Construction Planning & Development; Energy & Natural Resources → Utilities; Public Service & Safety → Emergency Response; Supply Chain & Transportation → Air & Space Transportation
exam_format: CBT, 60 MC (3 options each), 120 min, 70% passing, proctored at FAA Knowledge Testing Centers
notes: Flagship credential. Federal license for commercial sUAS. Age 16+. Recurrent training every 24 months. $175 exam. Cross-cutting across nearly every sector.

name: The Recreational UAS Safety Test (TRUST)
notes: Mandatory for recreational UAS operators. Free, one-time, no expiration. NOT proctored — not suitable for CTE accountability. Good intro activity for 9th/10th grade.

name: USI Small UAS Safety Certification — Level 1
notes: ASTM-aligned. 150-hr prep course. Valid 24 months. Ohio IWIP recognized (CR67, 6 pts). ~$200-400 exam. Stackable with Level 2.

name: USI Small UAS Safety Certification — Level 2
notes: Builds on Level 1. Advanced operations and risk assessment. Ohio IWIP recognized. 11th-12th grade or PS.

name: USI Visual Line of Sight Systems Operations — Ground School
notes: Ohio IWIP recognized (CR69, 6 pts). Ohio TechCred eligible. Prerequisite for VSO Flight Training.

name: USI Visual Line of Sight Systems Operations — Flight Training
notes: Ohio IWIP recognized (CR68, 6 pts). Requires in-person flight training (3-day sessions). ~$2000 full VSO program.

name: AUVSI Trusted Operator Program (TOP) — Level 1
cross_cutting_tags: Public Service & Safety → Emergency Response; Construction → Equipment Operation & Maintenance
exam_format: Online coursework + assessment; no flight assessment at L1
notes: Prerequisite: current Part 107. ~$499 via Embry-Riddle. Over 2500 certificates issued. Insurance benefits.

name: AUVSI Trusted Operator Program (TOP) — Level 2
cross_cutting_tags: Energy & Natural Resources → Utilities; Construction → Equipment Operation & Maintenance
exam_format: Online + mandatory in-person Practical Flight Assessment
notes: Prerequisite: TOP L1. Waiver operations near infrastructure. ~$599. PS-dominant.

name: AUVSI Trusted Operator Program (TOP) — Level 3
cross_cutting_tags: Energy & Natural Resources → Resource Extraction; Public Service & Safety → Emergency Response
exam_format: Online + mandatory PFA; recertification every 2 yrs
notes: Prerequisite: TOP L1+L2. Safety-critical operations. ~$599. Strictly PS/workforce.

name: DJI Enterprise Certification
exam_format: 12 hrs online + 2 days in-person + flight exam
notes: Manufacturer-specific (OEM). 8 U.S. training centers. Not on any state CTE list.

name: PIX4Dmapper Essentials Certification
cross_cutting_tags: Agriculture → Ag Tech & Automation; Construction → Architecture & Civil Engineering
notes: $199. Drone mapping/photogrammetry. Cross-cutting: precision ag, construction surveying.

name: PIX4Dfields Essentials Certification
cross_cutting_tags: Agriculture → Ag Tech & Automation; Agriculture → Plant Systems

name: DroneDeploy Pilot Certification
cross_cutting_tags: Construction → Construction Planning & Development; Agriculture → Ag Tech & Automation
exam_format: Online coursework + quizzes; 3-8 hrs; free; NOT proctored
notes: Free vendor badge. Not proctored — not eligible for state CTE lists.

name: senseFly Certified Operator
cross_cutting_tags: Agriculture → Ag Tech & Automation; Construction → Architecture & Civil Engineering
exam_format: 10 hrs online + trainer session + final exam
notes: OEM-specific for eBee fixed-wing mapping drones. PS/workforce. Niche.
